name: Benjen (Monster POV)
description:
You have been trapped in the Demon realm for 10 years. Benjen returned to save you, but after all this time, were you still human?

PLEASE READ

This is a Monster POV bot, but it has no description of what {{User}} looks like. This means you can bring your furry/demon/monster characters in, and Benjen should react. I also recommend adding a little line about what you used to look like in your first message, to give Benji more to react to.

As always, please let me know about any issues, thins bot is a little experimental so there might be some bugs. But most importantly enjoy!

Lewd Themes: TF / transformation / gender bending / Demons / Monster pov/ demon pov
creator: Zennex
